name: correction_sic

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.14 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] ［＃「X」はママ］ is the editorial sic marker: the preceding text X is reproduced as-in-the-source (a preserved irregularity). It annotates without transforming — the node carries the raw directive (rendered as a hidden aozora-annotation span) with the AnnotationKind::AsIs classification (pandoc/wire map `as-is`, not `unknown`). ~3k occurrences. Offsets from the §3 byte model; expected captured from the aozora #114/#118 reference implementation (the project's canonical processor).
